about.brandTitle: Na Golov[y] — professional niche aromatic cosmetics brand
about.brandText: Na Golov[y] is a Ukrainian niche aromatic cosmetics brand for hair, created for those who don't compromise on quality. Every product is the result of deep research and care for hair health and beauty.
about.brandAlt: Viola Hehedosh with Na Golov[y] products at Viola Salon
about.ownerP1: As a Na Golov[y] brand expert, founder of Viola beauty salon, with over 30 years of experience, I combine deep knowledge of hair care with a passion for true quality.
about.ownerP2: My approach is personal consultation and individually tailored care. Every session begins with hair and scalp diagnostics, after which we select the system that suits you best!
about.ownerP3: Viola Salon in Mukachevo, Zakarpattia region — a space where every client receives attention, professionalism and care. Here you can purchase Na Golov[y] cosmetics and receive consultation directly from a brand expert.
about.ownerAlt: Viola Hehedosh — Na Golovy Brand Expert
about.value1Desc: Every Na Gólov[y] product is created in collaboration with leading industry experts. Carefully selected ingredients guarantee impeccable effectiveness and absolute hair safety.
about.value2Desc: One Na Gólov[y] product can replace over 10 regular products. This provides endless possibilities: from deep hair restoration to creating the perfect glossy shine.
about.value3Desc: All products easily combine with each other. The brand uses niche perfume compositions with multi-layered fragrances that gradually unfold on the hair.
about.value4Desc: Na Golov[y] is a Ukrainian niche aromatic cosmetics brand where quality and customer care come first, and innovations have no analogues on the market.
about.line1Desc: Collagen, amino-ceramide, sulfate-free formulas for effective cleansing that promote strengthening and silkiness.
about.line2Desc: 9-protein care, amino-ceramides with 5 exotic oils. Active formulas that nourish and soften hair.
about.line3Desc: Diamond Gloss, polymer web-mask, collagen — giving hair softness, elasticity and shine along the entire length, protecting tips from splitting.
about.line4Desc: Leave-in cream-conditioners, ROYAL SHINE heat protection sprays, fluids protect hair from external influences, making it soft and well-groomed.
about.line5Desc: Multivitamin and hyaluronic tonics, BB cream for hair Silk+18-MEA — for effective conditioning, smoothing, giving hair a natural glow.
about.ctaTitle: Find the Right Care for Your Hair
about.ctaText: Get a personal consultation from a Na Golovy Brand Expert and find products that truly suit your hair.

delivery.title: Delivery & Payment
delivery.paymentP2: No waiting or delays — we work precisely and on time
delivery.paymentP3: Secure payment — 100% safe payment without commission
delivery.paymentNote: Payment is made by 100% prepayment via WayForPay payment system or bank transfer to FOP Hehedosh Violeta Valeriivna.
delivery.deliveryIntro: So you know exactly when to expect your Na Golov[y] order, here's our current shipping schedule:
delivery.deliveryTimeText: depends on the carrier and usually takes 1–3 days.
delivery.deliveryCare: You choose your favorite products — I'll make sure they reach you quickly and safely.
delivery.carrierText: Delivery is carried out across Ukraine by Nova Poshta.
delivery.carrierCost: Delivery cost is calculated according to the carrier's rates and is paid by the Buyer upon receipt or during checkout.
delivery.schedule1: Orders placed Monday to Saturday before 3:00 PM are shipped the same day.
delivery.schedule2: Orders placed after 3:00 PM are shipped the next morning.
delivery.schedule3: Orders placed on Saturday after 2:00 PM or on Sunday are shipped Monday morning.

poslugy.title: Services
poslugy.intro: I'm Viola Hehedosh — Na Golov[y] brand technologist, providing services for individual selection of professional hair cosmetics. I'll help you choose exactly what your hair needs.
poslugy.service1Desc: Individual selection of Na Golov[y] products for your hair type, scalp condition and preferences. We'll determine which shampoos, masks and conditioners are right for you.
poslugy.service2Desc: Can't make it to Mukachevo? I'll conduct a consultation online — via Telegram or Instagram. I'll explain how to properly combine products and build an effective care routine.
poslugy.service3Desc: I'll create a complete care program: from cleansing to leave-in products and heat protection. All Na Golov[y] lines are combinable — we'll find the perfect regimen for you.
poslugy.service4Desc: If you color your hair — I'll help you choose Na Golov[y] products that preserve color vibrancy and protect hair structure after coloring.
poslugy.ctaText: Want to book a consultation or have questions?
